data.title: Descartes uses AI to engage 720,000 drivers, connecting 435,000 more in months for better freight visibility.
data.description: An increase of over 720,000 AI-driven driver interactions has boosted network growth significantly, connecting an additional 435,000 drivers within a few months. This enhancement aims to enhance the accuracy of freight tracking operations.

data.title: MIAX Exchange Group sees 25.4% rise in multi-list options trading volume year-over-year for February 2026.
data.description: MIAX Exchange Group has announced a significant 25.4% rise in average daily volume (ADV) for multi-list options year over year. The company, headquartered in Princeton, New Jersey and Miami, revealed this positive growth on March 4, 2026. Miami International Holdings, Inc. (MIAX), listed on the New York Stock Exchange with the ticker symbol MIAX, is known for its technology-driven approach in constructing and managing regulated financial markets within various asset classes.

data.title: Target Hospitality (NASDAQ: TH) schedules Q4 and full year 2025 earnings release and conference call.
data.description: On March 4, 2026, Target Hospitality Corp., operating as "Target", a leading provider of modular accommodations and hospitality services in North America, shared an update. The company, listed on NASDAQ as TH, highlighted its position as a major player in the industry.

data.title: Huawei upgrades Financial AI solutions at MWC Barcelona 2026, aiming to power digital transformation in global finance.
data.description: In Barcelona, Spain on March 4, 2026, Huawei showcased their finance session titled "Powering Resilient Intelligence, Co-creating Finance Future" at MWC Barcelona 2026. The company unveiled a significant revamp of its Banking AI and Foundation Model Solutions, highlighting cutting-edge advancements in the finance sector.

data.title: Kraken is the first crypto firm to secure Fed master account as it gains access via Kansas City Fed approval. No full banking privileges granted.
data.description: Kraken Financial has secured authorization from the Kansas City Fed, allowing direct entry to payment systems operated by the US Federal Reserve. However, it should be noted that the approval does not include complete banking privileges, such as earning interest on reserves.

data.title: FATF warns of stablecoin P2P transfers as sanctions evasion, citing risks of bypassing AML checks. Calls for countries to evaluate and implement safeguards.
data.description: An international regulatory body has raised concerns over peer-to-peer (P2P) stablecoin transactions conducted through self-custody wallets, as they can circumvent anti-money laundering (AML) checks. The organization is advising countries to evaluate the associated risks and implement appropriate protective measures to counter this issue.

data.title: CrowdStrike stock rises slightly, posting fourth-quarter revenue of $1.31 billion, with expectations for first-quarter revenue of $1.36 billion to $1.364 billion and fiscal 2027 revenue of $5.87 billion to $5.93 billion. Executives point to strong demand for the Falcon platform driven by AI capabilities.
data.description: CrowdStrike Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ: CRWD) shares are trading slightly higher in the premarket session on Wednesday. The cloud-based cybersecurity company reported fourth-quarter revenue of $1.31 billion, exceeding analyst estimates. They expect first-quarter revenue between $1.36 billion to $1.364 billion and fiscal 2027 revenue in the range of $5.87 billion to $5.93 billion. During the conference call, executives highlighted strong demand for the Falcon platform due to AI-driven threats reshaping global security investments. The company emphasized that AI capabilities and platform expansion boosted ARR growth and profitability, with record performance in fiscal 2026 across revenue growth, operating income, and cash generation. CEO George underscored the robust growth in ARR.

data.title: Babcock & Wilcox (BW) Q4 earnings report: EPS beats estimates by 28.57% at $-0.05, revenue down $39.80M YoY.
data.description: On Wednesday, March 4, 2026 at 06:30 AM, Babcock & Wilcox (NYSE: BW) released their Q4 earnings report. They exceeded estimated earnings by 28.57%, revealing an EPS of $-0.05 compared to the expected $-0.07. Revenue saw a $39.80 million decrease from the previous year. For more details, the complete article can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: FBS Global meets Nasdaq compliance after shares close above $1 for 10 straight days. Bid price matter resolved.
data.description: The company's ordinary shares have maintained a closing price above $1.00 for ten consecutive trading days, meeting the listing requirement set by Nasdaq. This achievement demonstrates the stock's consistency in trading above the crucial $1.00 mark over the specified period. This sustained performance indicates the company's potential compliance with Nasdaq's listing standards, reflecting positively on its market presence.
